schedule: before 9am on the first day of the month

packageRules.description: Inference engine pins (ollama/uv/vllm/hf_transfer) — own PR each (each needs its own validation), labelled inference, stable-only

Bundled OpenCode coding-agent (monorepo #429) — own PR, inference-labelled, stable-only. The per-OS/arch sha256 set MUST be recomputed on every bump (no upstream checksum file); scripts/dev/update-opencode-sha.sh does it via postUpgradeTasks.
prBodyNotes: :warning: **opencode version bump**: the self-pinned `sha256` set (6 platforms) in `internal/runtime/codeui/install.go` (`artifacts` map) must match the new tag. `scripts/dev/update-opencode-sha.sh` recomputes all 6 via postUpgradeTasks when self-hosted Renovate has `allowedPostUpgradeCommands` enabled; otherwise run it by hand on this branch before merge.

packageRules.description: uv bump also needs UVPinnedSHA256Linux64 recomputed; postUpgradeTasks does it when self-hosted Renovate is allowed to run commands, else this note + label tell the reviewer
prBodyNotes: :warning: **uv version bump**: `UVPinnedSHA256Linux64` in `internal/runtime/uv.go` must match the new tarball. `scripts/dev/update-uv-sha.sh` recomputes it via postUpgradeTasks when self-hosted Renovate has `allowedPostUpgradeCommands` enabled; otherwise run it by hand on this branch before merge.

customManagers.description: Go const pins annotated with `// renovate: datasource=... depName=...`
